title: The Gate That Swings Both Ways
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
lore: For a heartbeat you remember her laugh, and how sure you once were that you deserved it.
help: A biconditional is two implications. `biconditional_intro(P, Q)` opens a case for each direction — discharge them with the axioms `fwd` and `bwd`.
